response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in software craftsmanship, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, requirements management, and client-facing consulting — critical for this role. His German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1, and his resume lacks evidence of team leadership beyond technical mentorship or project ownership.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across high-scale systems at Google and Meta
Strong open-source contributions with real-world impact in GIS and DevTools
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops and code practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit experience in UML, architectural modeling, or IT consulting client engagement
Lacks documented team leadership or project management of interdisciplinary teams
